## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test-only change
- [ ] Build / CI / maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and scoped.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I have updated documentation where behavior or usage changed.
- [ ] I have considered security, privacy, and agent-tooling implications.

## Testing

Describe how this was tested.

Paste commands, test output, screenshots, or manual validation steps here.

## Notes for Reviewers

Mention trade-offs, known limitations, or follow-up work.
